title: Income Tax Department Issues FAQs on ITR Filing for AY 2025-26 & AY 2026-27
content:
# Income Tax Department Issues FAQs on ITR Filing for AY 2025-26 & AY 2026-27

Ek important update hai! Income Tax Department ne recently FAQs release kiye hain to clarify the interplay and transition from the Income-tax Act, 1961 to the new Income-tax Act, 2025. This is crucial for understanding ITR filing for Assessment Years 2025-26 and 2026-27.

Here are the key points to remember:

*   **Income Tax Act Applicability:** For Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 (which covers income earned in Financial Year 2025-26), ITR filings will still be governed by the provisions of the **Income Tax Act, 1961**. The new Income-tax Act, 2025, will apply for "Tax Year 2026-27" (i.e., income earned from FY 2026-27 onwards), with returns due in July 2027.
*   **ITR Forms for AY 2026-27:** The existing ITR forms (ITR-1 to ITR-7, along with ITR-U and ITR-V) under the Income Tax Act, 1961, have been notified and will be used for filing returns for AY 2026-27.
*   **Due Dates for AY 2026-27:**
    *   **Individuals (non-audit cases, ITR-1 & ITR-2):** July 31, 2026.
    *   **Non-audit business/professional taxpayers (ITR-3 & ITR-4):** August 31, 2026.
    *   **Audit Cases:** October 31, 2026.
    *   **Transfer Pricing Cases:** November 30, 2026.
    *   **Belated Returns:** Can be filed on or before December 31, 2026, with applicable late fees.
    *   **Revised Returns:** Can be filed up to March 31, 2027.
    *   **Updated Returns (ITR-U):** Can be filed within four years from the end of the relevant assessment year, i.e., till March 31, 2031.
*   **AY 2025-26 Returns:** For Assessment Year 2025-26 (income of FY 2024-25), the time limit for filing revised or belated returns expired before April 1, 2026. However, taxpayers can still file an Updated Return (ITR-U) as per Section 139(8A) of the Income Tax Act, 1961.

The Income Tax Department's e-filing portal will support compliance under both the old and new Acts concurrently during this transition period.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/sites/default/files/2026-03/FAQs-on-Interplay-and-Transition-from-the-Income-tax-Act-1961-to-the-Income-tax-Act-2025.pdf)

*Published on: 12 April 2026*
